rationale: Educ. Code §38.256 concerns agency reports to the legislature on rubric changes and regional progress goals. It is wholly unrelated to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts.
quote: In addition to any other information required to be provided to the legislature under this chapter, not later than November 1 of each even-numbered year the agency shall provide to the legislature:
_note: No overlap in subject matter between the proposed homestead exemption increase and this education reporting statute.
